purpose: Per-research-area summaries of falsifiability assessment, populated by user after each research session concludes
workflow: User finishes research on a topic → asks session for summary → runs `python test_output/_add_falsifiability.py` with the summary → entry added to this library
merge_criterion: When 5+ summaries accumulated, can be used to (a) inform pa review's methodology section, (b) build a 'falsifiability checklist' tool, (c) write into CHANGELOG as a methodology guideline
